intent_tree: {"将MP3音频文件中的声音转换为文字并确保准确性": {"上传音频文件": {}, "选择合适的工具进行音频转文字": {"使用专业级工具（如讯飞听见、腾讯云语音识别）": {}, "使用国际通用工具（如OpenAI Whisper）": {}, "使用便捷型工具（如网易见外工作台）": {}}, "提升转写准确度": {"预处理音频以降噪": {}, "分离不同说话人": {}, "添加专业领域术语优化": {}, "人工校对结果": {}}, "下载并保存转写后的文本文件": {}, "改进音频转文字方案": {"自动分段处理长音频": {}, "基于时间戳添加章节标记": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "访问工具官网并找到上传按钮"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "上传本地MP3音频文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "设置转写参数（语言、时间戳等）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "启动音频转文字任务"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "下载生成的TXT/SRT格式文本文件"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "调用OpenAI Whisper API进行音频转文字"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "预处理音频以降低背景噪音"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "分离不同说话人的音频内容"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "添加自定义词库以优化专业术语识别"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "人工校对转写结果"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "将音频文件分段处理（若时长过长）"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "转换音频格式为最佳识别格式（如WAV）"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "自动检测并分割长音频"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "基于时间戳插入章节标题"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "生成带章节标记的最终文本文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "upload"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "configure"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "startTranscription"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "downloadResult"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node5", "type": "saveResult"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node6", "type": "preprocessAudio"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node6", "type": "separateSpeakers"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node6", "type": "addCustomVocabulary"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node5", "type": "manualCorrection"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node2", "type": "splitAudio"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node2", "type": "convertFormat"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node6", "type": "segmentLongAudio"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "addHeadings"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node15", "type": "generateFinalText"}]}
